## Summary

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs or examples if behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, `.env.local`, signing keys, `.next`, or local `.data` proof files.
- [ ] I considered World App Store review impact.
- [ ] I considered privacy impact for post text, proof commitments, and nullifiers.
